title: magnolia zhengyiana
intro: Magnolia zhengyiana, also known as the Zhengyiana magnolia or the Fu Shou, is a species of flowering plant in the family Magnoliaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese medicine, for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Magnolia zhengyiana is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional remedies such as soups and tonics.
